title: The 3 Most Undervalued Materials Stocks to Buy Now: August 2023

title: Corteva, Inc. (CTVA) Q2 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: Corteva, Inc. (CTVA) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.60 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.58 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.64 per share a year ago.
